data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: The website design ensures easy navigation with accessible interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes large clickable areas for primary navigation.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified navigation reduces user decision time.
data.technical_spec: Minimizes choice overload by categorizing information hierarchically.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Consistent design aesthetics to help users recognize patterns.
data.technical_spec: Design elements leverage proximity, similarity, and continuity.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information chunks are managed to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Content is divided into digestible sections and subsections.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Leverages common design conventions for familiarity.
data.technical_spec: Aligns with standard web navigation and interface rules.
